# SPIR-V grammar provenance

`spirv.core.grammar.json` is copied from SPIRV-Headers tag
`vulkan-sdk-1.4.350.1`, commit
`ad9184e76a66b1001c29db9b0a3e87f646c64de0`.  Its Git blob object is
`22f5fe9c76f1fb292e93629d316ac6ff69fd193f` (SPIR-V 1.6 revision 4).

The build never downloads this file.  Run `tools/generate-spirv/generate.sh`
to check the pinned source before updating `Vpipe.SpirV.Generated`.
